questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Network Firewalls?
options: Inefficient scaling of Packet filtering rules (stateless vs stateful firewalls).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Packet filtering rules (stateless vs stateful firewalls).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Packet filtering rules (stateless vs stateful firewalls) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
